profiles_updated.what_changed: One new LOST trade: 'Will Max Holloway win by KO or TKO?' NO @ 0.450 CONTESTED (Jul 12). This is a Sports/MMA market — completely outside trusted domains (Iran_ME, Russia_UKR). Pattern 3 fires: DOMAIN_SPECIALIST stepping outside trusted domains (thin data, 1 trade). Archetype and signal weight unchanged. Last-10 accuracy = 5/10 = 50%, no deterioration flag. geo_elo_active updated to 2923.2 (still strongly LEGENDARY). PNL updated to $137 (still anomalously low, primary blocker unchanged). Open positions assessed for first time: multiple US Elections positions (House control, CA Gov, Maine Senate, Alaska Gov primary) also outside trusted domains — pre-profiling behavior, not new.

Two new trades since Jul 6: (1) Spain FIFA Semifinals YES @ 0.710 WON (Jul 6) — Sports, contested, out-of-scope per agent rules; (2) Bank of Korea rate increase NO @ 0.041 LOST (Jul 15) — Economics/Asia, near-certainty position that resolved against the trader. The Bank of Korea loss is the most significant new data point: a 0.041 near-certainty NO (96% implied probability of NO) resolved YES. This is yield-harvester tail risk materializing — the exact pattern documented at first profiling. YIELD_HARVESTER archetype confirmed, EXCLUDE status unchanged. SEVERE performance deterioration: last-10 = 2/10 = 20% accuracy (was 40% at Jul 6, now catastrophically worse). geo_elo_active decaying: 2470.8 (Jun 29) → 2395.8 (Jul 6) → 2278.8 (Jul 20). Still LEGENDARY but shedding ~57 elo_active points per week.

Notable deferred candidates: 0xe0f1e775 (308 geo trades, 83% last-30 accuracy, $28,573 PNL — probably Russia_UKR YIELD_HARVESTER given 43% near-cert), 0xc8b9a30 ($40,265 PNL, 30% last-30 accuracy — unusual contrarian longshot buyer), 0x5f0b2ef7 (lower directionality 0.775, potentially more contested entry style). pipeline_collapse_critical.description: 12 formerly LEGENDARY and NEAR_LEGENDARY traders now have geo_elo=NULL, geo_elo_active=NULL, geo_accuracy_pool=0, geo_resolved_trades_count=0 in the DB. These traders were at LEGENDARY levels (2099-2722 geo_elo_active) as recently as June 18 2026 per elo_snapshots. The elo_snapshots table stops at June 18 for these traders — confirming snapshot_elo_scores.py (Step 19) has not captured them since that date. The DB values were not gradually decayed — they were wiped to NULL.
pipeline_collapse_critical.signal_impact: These 12 traders include 9 Russia_UKR DOMAIN_SPECIALISTs (the core of any Russia_UKR signal pool) and 2 additional NEAR_LEGENDARY specialists. The canonical query (geo_elo_active>=2175, pool_c=1) returns NULL for all of them — they are completely invisible to every pipeline stage. The Russia_UKR open position intelligence has been blind to their positions for at least 5 weeks. This is the SIXTH consecutive week the underlying bug has been flagged.
pipeline_collapse_critical.resolution: Oscar must investigate update_geo_elo.py and the geo_accuracy_pool recalculation. The specific failure: geo_resolved_trades_count is 0 for these traders (only 5-6 rows in trades table per address, while their actual position history shows hundreds of resolved geo positions). update_geo_elo.py uses trade counts to compute ELO — if it reads from the trades table directly and these traders have thin trade records, their geo_elo would be cleared. Their positions are stored in the positions table, not the trades table. This architectural mismatch is the likely root cause.
pipeline_collapse_critical.profile_action: Profiles for these 12 traders are NOT updated this cycle. Their stored archetype/domain/weight data is preserved. DO NOT change stored profiles based on the NULL DB values — these are artifacts. When pipeline is fixed, re-run tier validation against restored elo_active values.

action_items: CRITICAL — SIXTH CONSECUTIVE WEEK: geo_elo_active pipeline collapse. 12 formerly LEGENDARY Russia_UKR DOMAIN_SPECIALISTs (geo_elo_active 2099-2722 as of Jun 18) now have NULL geo_elo values in DB. Root cause hypothesis: update_geo_elo.py reads from trades table for geo trade count, but these traders have only 5-6 trades table rows (their positions are stored in the positions table only). Fix required before any Russia_UKR signal generation is possible. elo_snapshots stopped capturing them after Jun 18 — every day without a fix means another lost historical data point.
